holdings.infoBox: FPRO is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prologis stock at 9.72%, Equinix at 9.65%, Welltower at 8.72%, American Tower at 8.20%, and Digital Realty Trust at 4.51%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Real Estate Investment ETF (FPRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is an actively-managed, non-transparent ETF that invests in global real estate companies. The fund utilizes the Fidelity non-transparent model. FPRO was launched on Feb 2, 2021 and is issued by Fidelity.
